scripts.build: npm run build:server && npm run build:client
scripts.build:server: cd server && npm install && npm run build
scripts.build:client: cd client && npm install && npm run build
scripts.start: echo 'To start development, run: npm run dev:server and npm run dev:client in separate terminals.'
scripts.deploy: echo 'Please use the Render Dashboard to deploy using the render.yaml file.'
